data.title: Cibox Inter@ctive SA Reports February 2025 Voting Rights and Share Capital
data.description:
Cibox Inter@ctive SA ( (FR:ALCBX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cibox Inter@ctive SA released its monthly information on the total number of voting rights and shares as of February 28, 2025. The company reported a total of 290,583,765 shares making up its capital, with gross voting rights totaling 301,755,464 and net voting rights at 294,513,262. This information is crucial for stakeholders as it reflects the company’s current shareholding structure and voting power distribution, which can influence corporate governance and decision-making processes.

More about Cibox Inter@ctive SA

Founded in 1995, Cibox is a French technology company specializing in consumer electronics, particularly in the electric micro-mobility sector. The company designs, manufactures, and maintains products like scooters and electric bikes, focusing on journeys between 3 to 30 km. Cibox markets its products under the brands Scooty and yeep.me, and in 2024, it achieved a turnover of €9.8 million. Its shares are listed on Euronext Growth Paris.

YTD Price Performance: -33.33%

Average Trading Volume: 8,941

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €5M

data.title: Epwin Group Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Epwin Group plc ( (GB:EPWN) ) just unveiled an update.

Epwin Group Plc has executed a share repurchase, buying back 25,000 ordinary shares at a price of 88.5 pence each, as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. This move, aimed at reducing the number of shares in circulation, will result in the cancellation of these shares, leaving the company with a total of 136,523,395 shares in issue, which could potentially enhance shareholder value by increasing earnings per share.

More about Epwin Group plc

Epwin Group Plc is a leading UK-based manufacturer specializing in energy-efficient and low-maintenance building products. The company holds significant market shares in the Repair, Maintenance and Improvement (RMI), new build, and social housing sectors.

YTD Price Performance: -10.88%

data.title: Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC ( (GB:ASL) ) has provided an announcement.

Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC has executed a market purchase of 25,000 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 1,368.00p per share, as part of its share buyback program authorized during the Annual General Meeting. This transaction reduces the total number of shares in issue to 82,488,105, reflecting the company’s ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC

Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC operates within the financial sector, focusing on investment management services. The company primarily invests in smaller UK companies, aiming to deliver long-term growth for its stakeholders.

data.title: Independence Gold Unveils Promising Drill Results at 3Ts Project
data.description:
Independence Gold ( (TSE:IGO) ) has shared an update.

Independence Gold Corp. announced significant drilling results from the Johnny and Ted-Mint Vein Systems at its 3Ts Project in British Columbia, highlighting the discovery of robust gold-silver-bearing veins. The recent drill results, particularly from the Johnny Vein System, indicate potential contributions to an upcoming resource update, with both vein systems remaining open for further exploration. The ongoing drilling program aims to expand the known high-grade zones, reinforcing the project’s growth potential and positioning Independence Gold for future resource development.

More about Independence Gold

Independence Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold and silver mineral resources. The company is engaged in projects primarily in British Columbia, Canada, with a significant focus on the 3Ts Project, which encompasses a series of mineral claims in the Nechako Plateau region.

Average Trading Volume: 198,778

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

data.title: Draganfly Appoints Former U.S. Secretary of Defense to Board
data.description:
Draganfly ( (TSE:DPRO) ) has provided an announcement.

Draganfly Inc. has announced the appointment of Christopher C. Miller, former Acting U.S. Secretary of Defense, to its Board of Directors. Miller’s extensive experience in defense and intelligence is expected to guide Draganfly’s strategic initiatives in the government, defense, and aerospace sectors, strengthening its position as a leader in North American-made drone solutions for defense, law enforcement, and public safety.

More about Draganfly

Draganfly Inc. is a global leader in drone technology, AI, and autonomous systems, providing innovative solutions for public safety, defense, agriculture, and industrial applications. With over 25 years of experience, the company is recognized for its groundbreaking contributions to the UAV industry and commitment to delivering cutting-edge, North American-made technology.

data.title: Ocado Group Enhances Stakeholder Alignment with Share Incentive Plan
data.description:
Ocado Group ( (GB:OCDO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ocado Group plc announced the participation of its directors and senior management in the Ocado Share Incentive Plan (SIP), allowing them to purchase ordinary shares at market value with monthly salary deductions and receive matching shares. This initiative is part of Ocado’s strategy to align the interests of its management with those of shareholders, potentially impacting the company’s market positioning and stakeholder engagement positively.

More about Ocado Group

Ocado Group plc is a prominent player in the retail and technology industries, primarily known for its online grocery retail services and innovative automation solutions. The company focuses on leveraging cutting-edge technology to enhance the efficiency of its operations and expand its market presence.

data.title: Pinewood Technologies to Announce Full-Year Results Amid Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Pinewood Technologies ( (GB:PINE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC announced it will release its full-year results for the eleven months ended 31 December 2024 on 1 April 2025. The announcement highlights Pinewood’s strategic initiatives, including its recent independence and partnership with Lithia Motors Inc., which positions the company for growth in the North American market. This development is significant for stakeholders as it reflects Pinewood’s commitment to expanding its global footprint and enhancing its service offerings in the automotive software industry.

More about Pinewood Technologies

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC is a leading cloud-based software provider for the automotive industry, offering a comprehensive automotive intelligence platform. Established in 1981 and headquartered in the UK, Pinewood serves over 30,000 users across 21 countries and collaborates with more than 50 OEM brands. The company became independent in 2024 after separating from Pendragon PLC and has formed a strategic partnership with Lithia Motors Inc. to expand its market presence in North America.

data.title: Urban Logistics REIT Announces Strategic Moves and Shareholder Consultation
data.description:
Urban Logistics REIT plc ( (GB:SHED) ) has shared an announcement.

Urban Logistics REIT plc has announced a shareholder consultation exercise regarding its proposed internalization, which aims to enhance alignment with shareholders and secure a leading logistics real estate management team. The company has also disposed of three assets for £26.3 million, reflecting a strategic move to recycle capital into higher-yielding opportunities. With 122 asset management opportunities identified, Urban Logistics is poised for significant EPS growth and capital value uplift. The company continues to benefit from strong sector dynamics, including high tenant demand and limited new space availability, positioning it well for future growth.

More about Urban Logistics REIT plc

Urban Logistics REIT plc is a London-listed real estate investment trust specializing in the rapidly growing ‘last touch’ logistics sub-sector. The company focuses on managing and developing logistics assets, with a strategic emphasis on active asset management and core assets to maximize income and capital value. Urban Logistics has consistently outperformed the UK REIT sector and relevant indices since its IPO in 2016.

data.title: AMTD Group Announces New Film ‘A Gilded Game’ Starring Andy Lau
data.description:

AMTD Group, in collaboration with its subsidiary AMTD Digital and World Media and Entertainment Universal Inc., has announced the upcoming release of a new movie titled ‘A Gilded Game,’ set to premiere in China on May 1. The film, starring Andy Lau and Oho Ou, marks AMTD’s fourth collaboration with Lau, following previous box office successes. This venture underscores AMTD’s commitment to producing high-quality entertainment and is expected to further solidify its position in the media and entertainment industry.

AMTD IDEA Group, a part of AMTD, is a diversified institution and digital solutions group that connects companies and investors with global markets, offering comprehensive business services and digital solutions.

data.title: Tocvan Ventures Reports High-Grade Gold Finds at Gran Pilar Project
data.description:
Tocvan Ventures Corp. ( (TSE:TOC) ) just unveiled an update.

Tocvan Ventures Corp. announced promising results from its recent core drilling at the Gran Pilar Gold Silver Project in Sonora, Mexico. The drilling revealed significant gold mineralization, including 1.6 g/t gold over 36.3 meters from the surface, with higher grades of 15.2 g/t over 1.2 meters and 5.8 g/t over 3 meters. These results represent an upgrade from previous local historic drilling, indicating potential for moderate to high-grade ore sourcing for future mining operations. The company is awaiting results from six additional drill holes, which will contribute to a maiden resource estimate and further development plans.

More about Tocvan Ventures Corp.

Tocvan Ventures Corp. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on gold and silver exploration. The company is primarily involved in the development of the Gran Pilar Gold Silver Project located in Sonora, Mexico, where it holds a majority stake in partnership with Colibri Resource Corp.

YTD Price Performance: 33.33%

Average Trading Volume: 23,961

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$36.88M
